hand.name: Adapt
hand.description: Smart: plays as Block vs ATK, Cleanse vs debuff, else Attack.

hand.name: Foresight
hand.description: Draw 2 cards. Charge bonus: also reveal next intent.

relics.name: Swift Boots
relics.description: Draw 6 cards per turn instead of 5.

notes: Rabbit Hole debuffs heavily. Player already has Weakness (1 turn left). Enemy about to add Vulnerable. Cleanse removes weakness but costs 1 AP. Adapt sees player is debuffed so would auto-Cleanse. Foresight is free (0 AP). Chain 2 gives damage bonus. Is Cleanse worth 1 AP? Or let weakness expire and push damage with chain bonus? Adapt vs Cleanse — both achieve the same cleanse but Adapt also could deal damage if not debuffed. Classic 'reactive vs proactive' choice.
